reason: led carries two common everyday senses: the anatomical 'joint' (primary) and 'route/trail' — a marked hiking or cycling trail, very common in Sweden. Relocated from 90-manual into the split layer so its promoted 'route' participates in the sense pass's grouping (route → led/rutt/sträckning asked as one multi-answer card); the §12 stopgap gloss retires.
